arts.sum: Valencia have set their sights on young talent Alex Jimenez, who has been making waves with AC Milan's youth team. The post Valencia pursue Alex Jimenez: Milan’s decision and Real Madrid’s Influence appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Why Atlético can beat Barcelona, Real Madrid to LaLiga title this season
arts.sum: With Barcelona and Real Madrid looking vulnerable this season, Atlético Madrid have the opportunity to contend for the title. Will they take it?

arts.ttl: Why are Barcelona and Real Madrid not playing in the second round of the 24/25 Copa del Rey?
arts.sum: Real Madrid and Barça are the league representatives as winners and runners-up from the 23-24 season with Athletic Club and Real Mallorca the Copa del Rey winners and beaten finalists last season. However, attentive Spanish football fans will notice that a handful of high profile teams are absent from the second round games with Real Madrid, FC Barcelona, Athletic Club and Real Mallorca all missing out from the opening stage and this round.

arts.ttl: Dani Ceballos: Real Madrid 'make decision' on future of 'essential resource' amid Real Betis links
arts.sum: Real Madrid reportedly make a decision on the future of Real Betis-linked Dani Ceballos ahead of the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: 'I've told him': What Carlo Ancelotti said to Martin Odegaard before he left Real Madrid for Arsenal
Revealed: FIFA confirm pots for 2025 Club World Cup draw - with Chelsea, Man City and Real Madrid all set to feature in the United States tournament
arts.sum: The 2025 Club World Cup will be contested by 32 clubs from the six continental confederations and will be the first edition in this format to take place in the United States.

arts.ttl: Liverpool are 'yet to make a breakthrough in contract talks' with Trent Alexander-Arnold 'despite working hard to keep the England right back' - with Real Madrid monitoring the situation closely
arts.sum: Alexander-Arnold is a boyhood Liverpool fan, and has been at the club for all his career, but with no contract extension agreed he has been linked with a move away to Real Madrid with increasing regularity.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid interested in breakout Bundesliga star to strengthen midfield
arts.sum: Real Madrid may well seek to strengthen their midfield next summer, helping to fill the void left by Toni Kroos this year. One of the talents they have set eyes upon is Eintracht Frankfurt’s Hugo Larsson. The 20-year-old midfielder has been in fine form for Eintracht, who are currently Bayern Munich’s strongest challengers in the […] The post Real Madrid interested in breakout Bundesliga star to strengthen midfield appeared first on Football España.

arts.sum: Tuesday's football transfer rumours, with updates on Diogo Dalot, Christopher Nkunku, Cristian Romero, Mason Greenwood & more.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid identify signing target in search for ‘new Toni Kroos’
arts.sum: Real Madrid are feeling the absence of Toni Kroos, an irreplaceable player whose presence in midfield is sorely missed. According to Sky Germany, the club is closely monitoring Hugo Larsson .
